subject: WM-0055 ready for review
body: Repaired WM-0055 review findings: bounded createExplanation traversal with cap/visited metrics and cap-hit trace evidence, lane-specific relationship source metadata so trust explanations cite trust sources, and runtime rejection for malformed social event kinds. Added regressions; typecheck, focused Vitest, supported sim-core wrapper, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, and pnpm quality pass.
